hero.slogan: I am Roundly Beautiful and I own it…

apropos.label: About
apropos.titre: Celebrating beauty in all its splendor
apropos.texte1: Miss Ronde & Belle Cameroun is the first national pageant celebrating Cameroonian women in all their diversity and magnificence. Beauty, grace, intelligence — no size criteria defines the woman worthy of being crowned here.
apropos.texte2: An event that proudly carries the colors of Cameroon and redefines African beauty standards.

participer.label: Participate
participer.etape1Texte: Fill out the online application form and submit your photos.
participer.etape2Texte: Our jury selects candidates for regional pre-selections.
participer.etape3Texte: Finalists compete at an unforgettable gala evening in Yaoundé.

tickets.label: Tickets
tickets.titre: Join us for the grand finale
tickets.desc: Payment available by credit card, PayPal, Orange Money & MTN Mobile Money.

footer.slogan: Beauty without borders, the pride of a nation.
footer.droits: © 2025 Miss Ronde & Belle Cameroun. All rights reserved.
